zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen de Fitton於1195年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特時，她的父親Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight21歲，母親Ellen fitz Elias17歲。她於1214年與Robert William Howard在英國諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1265年在英國諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得享年70歲，埋葬在澳洲維斯特 奧斯特拉利亞未知 易曼德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen de Fitton于1195年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特时，她的父亲Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight21岁，母亲Ellen fitz Elias17岁。她于1214年与Robert William Howard在英国諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1265年在英国諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得享年70岁，埋葬在澳大利亚維斯特 奧斯特拉利亞未知 易曼德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen de Fitton was born in 1195, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, was 21 and her mother, Ellen fitz Elias, was 17. She married Robert William Howard in 1214, in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1265, in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen de Fitton est née en 1195, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ellen fitz Elias, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Robert William Howard en 1214, à Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1265, à Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australie.

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen de Fitton(이)가 1195년 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen fitz Elias(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1214년 영국 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 피터에서 Robert William Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 영국 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 피터에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트레일리아 웨스터 오스트라리야 노운 이슬랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen de Fitton nasceu em 1195, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ellen fitz Elias, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert William Howard em 1214, em Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1265, em Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Unknown Island, Western Australia, Austrália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen de Fitton родилась в 1195 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ellen fitz Elias, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert William Howard в 1214 г. в местности вигенолл ст питир, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1265 г. в местности вигенолл ст питир, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности унноун исланд, вестирн аустраля, Австралия.
